import { batch as storeBatch } from '@tanstack/store' import { isServer } from '@tanstack/router-core/isServer' // `@tanstack/store`'s `batch` is for reactive notification batching. // On the server we don't subscribe/render reactively, so a lightweight // implementation that just executes is enough. export function batch<T>(fn: () => T): T { if (isServer) { return fn() } let result!: T storeBatch(() => { result = fn() }) return result }
